description: Gate-driven corpus for cicd-security: each fixture is a GitHub Actions workflow run through the same PolicyCheck the CI gate uses. Filenames carry the .github/workflows/ prefix because the gate's dispatch requires it.

fixtures.text:
name: pr
on: pull_request_target
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@8edcb1bdb4e25140b69c05f6e2a13fe90568de4a
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
      - run: npm install && npm test
fixtures.reason: pull_request_target + checkout of attacker-controlled head = classic pwn request

fixtures.text:
name: greet
on: issues
jobs:
  greet:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - run: echo "New issue: ${{ github.event.issue.title }}"
fixtures.reason: attacker-controlled event field interpolated straight into a shell line

fixtures.text:
name: ci
on: push
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@main
      - run: echo ok
fixtures.reason: mutable ref instead of a commit SHA pin

fixtures.text:
name: ci
on: push
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@8edcb1bdb4e25140b69c05f6e2a13fe90568de4a
      - run: echo ok
fixtures.reason: SHA-pinned action, least-privilege permissions, no tainted interpolation
